About Me

Let me tell you a little bit about myself...

BIO

Hello, my name is Reinis. I'm a Technology loving person with good analytical skills. I have experience with data analysis and SQL query writing on large sets of data. Data visualization in tableau and excel. KPI production. Experience working as Tier-1 support staff for large operation.

Education and Training

09/2010 - 07/2010

- Professional educational centre "Rigas Technical College" professional high school,(Latvia)

- Diploma of professional higher education / Office Assistant

Education and Training

08/02/2019 - 21/03/2019

- Riga Coding School (Web Development with UI design basics)

- Sertificate for acquiring theoretical and practical knowledge in HTML, CSS3, JavaScript and PHP (120 academic hours)

Work Experience

Junior Business Intelligence Analyst
Evolution Gaming, Riga(Latvia)

- Sustain, create, modify and update Pentaho automated reports
- SQL query writing or changing an existing one to fit the needs of the situation
- Organisations operational, product and financial data analysis
- Data visualisations via MS Excel and Tableau
- User friendly dashboard creation via Tableau
- Monthly KPI production
- Query event data via Hive/HADOOP

Work Experience

10/2015–06/2016

Service Manager
Evolution Gaming, Riga (Latvia)

- Identifying and resolving all real-time incidents on the gaming floor relating to all components of operations, including but not limited to hardware, software and network connectivity
- ​Identifying and resolving all game irregularities due to dealer mistake, software issues or any other reason​
- Resolving players' disputes related to the actions of the dealer or any other event that could have affected the integrity of the game​
- Monitoring critical application functions and infrastructure components via the provided monitoring tools; identifying, analysing, logging and escalating all alerts as necessary
- Work with internal systems (JIRA, TTS, WIKI, etc.)
- Manage ad-hoc situations which may occur on shift in appropriate manner to still be able to deliver all products

Work Experience

08/2014 - 10/2015

Operator / Game Presenter
Evolution Gaming, Riga(Latvia)

- Carry out all gaming operations - table administration, testing and certification
- Communicate and assist players verbally and trough the live chat system
